notableEvents.label: Zack Short pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zack Short flies out to center fielder Ryan Kreidler.

notableEvents.label: Wenceel Pérez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Wenceel Pérez homers (7) on a fly ball to left center field. Jake Rogers scores.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling grounds out, third baseman Brooks Lee to first baseman Kody Clemens.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler grounds out softly, pitcher Tyler Holton to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Royce Lewis to 3rd. Victor Caratini to 2nd.
